title: Hud Texts
description: If you want UI texts with variables then this mod is for you.
body:
![Day Counter banner](https://i.ibb.co/SvkSHq7/banner.png)
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📝About:**
If you want UI texts with variables then this mod is for you.
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **⚙️Features:**
- Supported Engine: FORGE
- Supported Game Versions: 1.19.2, 1.19.4, 1.20.1, 1.20.4, 1.20.6, 1.21.1
- Fully customizable
- Variables (There will be more)
- Variable list
- Color codes
- Formatting
- Command to turn off/on

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **✅Compatible mods:**
[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/470/588/637757747386104652.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ag-day-counter)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/806/365/638174223471319247.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ag-show-my-coordinates-mod)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📜Our partner:**
![Partner](https://i.ibb.co/JqPjJKf/bisect-hosting2.png)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **💡Ideas:**
- If you have an idea which makes the mod better then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#💡idea-suggestions** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **👾Bugs:**
- If you have found a bug then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#🧰bug-reports** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
